name: Fig Sugar Plums
recipeInstructions:
1. Gently pull the figs into their original shape, smoothing out wrinkles and perking up stems.
2. Using a sharp, small knife, carefully slit the smoothest side of each fig.
3. Stuff the figs plump and full with one or more of the following fillings:
- Half of mint or wintergreen cream patties
- Half of chocolate-covered mint patties
- Salted nuts
- Toasted walnut meats
- Marshmallow, with a piece of chocolate tucked inside
- Wedge of candied ginger
- Ground nuts mixed with honey
- Fondant
- Ground or chopped salted peanuts mixed with peanut butter
- Blanched almonds, toasted slowly in the oven
- Candied cherry
- Chunk of candied pineapple
4. Arrange the filled figs on a decorative tray.
5. Place a candle into a stem-clipped fig to serve as a candle stick and conversation piece.
